name: navigation-menu
description: A site navigation bar with rich dropdown panels (a navigation landmark, not a menu role), matched to Radix NavigationMenu; intent-delay hover open, pointer-leave close, real <a> links, Escape closes, arrow keys move between triggers; positioned by @floating-ui/dom.
docs: Register <lv-navigation-menu> by importing components/ui/navigation-menu.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { key, label, href? (plain link), links? } where links are { label, href, description?, icon? }; an item with `links` becomes a trigger that opens a content panel, otherwise it is a bare <a>. Set `label`, `open-delay`, `close-delay`. Links are real anchors (browser navigation); listen for `lv-open` / `lv-close` (detail = { key }) to react to panel state.
